subject: Vanillish, an ice cream-shaped ice creature floating in a snowy winter scene
description: A small ice cream cone-shaped creature floats in a pastel winter scene. The figure has a swirled ice cream scoop body topped with a pointed peak, small dot eyes, and stub-like arms raised to either side. Around it, pale blue ice shards and snowflakes drift in the air, and the background suggests a snowy forest with soft blue and white tones. The image conveys a light, chilly, magical atmosphere. The palette is dominated by pale blues, white, and icy teal.
foreground: ice cream-shaped creature with raised stub arms, surrounded by ice shards
background: snowy forest scene in pale blue and white
